page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Distributed AuTomatic Metagenomic Assembly and Annotation framework
page_metadata.biotools__summary: DATMA (Distributed AuTomatic Metagenomic Assembly and annotation framework) is a distributed automatic pipeline for fast metagenomic analysis that includes: sequencing quality control, 16S-identification, reads binning, de novo assembly, ORF detection and taxonomic annotation.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DATMA (Distributed AuTomatic Metagenomic Assembly and annotation framework) is a distributed automatic pipeline for fast metagenomic analysis that includes: sequencing quality control, 16S-identification, reads binning, de novo assembly, ORF detection and taxonomic annotation.
